dispute-manager.UNAUTHORIZED_DISPUTE: You are not authorized to manage this dispute

kyc.pending: Your verification request is currently pending review.
kyc.not_found: No KYC record found for this account.

body.OFF_PLATFORM_PAYMENT: A user was flagged for attempting or encouraging off-platform payment. Evidence includes payment-related keywords or contact details shared in chat.
body.FAKE_PROFILE: A user profile was flagged for inconsistencies between claimed skills, verification status, and scoring data.
body.PAYMENT_ANOMALY: A transaction pattern was detected that deviates from normal behaviour. This may indicate money laundering, refund abuse, or other financial fraud.
body.DUPLICATE_LISTING: A job listing was flagged as a potential duplicate of an existing posting from the same company.

admin.false_positive: Fraud alert marked as false positive
admin.confirmed: Fraud alert confirmed � user may be suspended

rule.disabled: Fraud detection rule has been disabled
rule.enabled: Fraud detection rule has been enabled
rule.threshold_exceeded: Alert score exceeded the configured threshold

notification.user_resolved: Your flagged activity has been reviewed and resolved by the platform administration.
notification.user_false_positive: Your flagged activity has been reviewed and determined to be legitimate. No action was taken.
notification.user_confirmed: Your flagged activity has been confirmed as violating platform policy. Your account may be subject to restrictions.

email.subject: Beleqet Security: Fraud Alert Notification
email.body: A new fraud alert has been generated on the Beleqet platform. Please review it in the admin dashboard.

gdpr.retention_notice: This record will be retained for {days} days in accordance with GDPR data retention policy.
gdpr.export_audit: GDPR data export for fraud alerts performed
gdpr.delete_audit: GDPR data deletion for fraud alerts performed

video_interview.already_exists: A video interview session already exists for this application.
video_interview.application_not_found: Application not found or you do not have access.
video_interview.expired: This video interview session has expired. Please contact the employer to request a new one.
video_interview.gdpr_deleted: This interview data has been permanently deleted in accordance with our data retention policy.
video_interview.processing_failed: Video processing failed. Please re-upload your response or contact support.
video_interview.transcription_failed: Transcription service encountered an error. Your response has been saved � we will retry automatically.
video_interview.evaluation_failed: AI evaluation could not be completed at this time. Our team has been notified.
video_interview.service_unavailable: The video processing service is temporarily unavailable due to repeated errors. Please try again in a few minutes.
video_interview.upload_required: A video file URL is required to submit this response.
video_interview.invalid_question_index: Invalid question index. Please ensure you are responding to a valid interview question.
video_interview.evaluation_pending: Interview evaluation is still in progress. Please check back shortly.
video_interview.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this interview session.
video_interview.gdpr_request_accepted: Your data deletion request has been accepted. All interview data will be permanently removed within 30 days.
video_interview.invalid_video_url: The video URL must point to an approved Beleqet storage or CDN host.
